text.title: MCP Security — Consent, Injection Defenses, Access Controls — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `mcp-security`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: inventory
step.action: Map each server: name, transport, scope, primitive types, data sensitivity.

step.name: grade-auth
step.action: Score against r2 for remote; mark N/A for local desktop.

step.name: grade-injection-defence
step.action: Score against r3 (output-as-data) + r5 (no cross-server trust).

step.name: grade-audit
step.action: Score against r6; verify storage outside MCP host; r7 allow-list.
